debug_info.goal:
a b c d s : ℝ
h₀ : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c ∧ 0 < d
h₁ : s = a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d)
⊢ 1 < s ∧ s < 2

proof:
have h₂ : 1 < s := by
    have h₃ : 0 < a := by linarith
    have h₄ : 0 < b := by linarith
    have h₅ : 0 < c := by linarith
    have h₆ : 0 < d := by linarith
    have h₇ : 0 < a + b + c + d := by linarith
    have h₈ : 0 < a + b + d := by linarith
    have h₉ : 0 < a + b + c := by linarith
    have h₁₀ : 0 < b + c + d := by linarith
    have h₁₁ : 0 < a + c + d := by linarith
    have h₁₂ : a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) > 1 := by
      -- Use the fact that each term is positive and the denominators are smaller than the sum of all variables
      have h₁₃ : 0 < a * b := by positivity
      have h₁₄ : 0 < a * c := by positivity
      have h₁₅ : 0 < a * d := by positivity
      have h₁₆ : 0 < b * c := by positivity
      have h₁₇ : 0 < b * d := by positivity
      have h₁₈ : 0 < c * d := by positivity
      -- Use the Titu's lemma (a special case of Cauchy-Schwarz) to show that the sum is greater than 1
      field_simp [h₈.ne', h₉.ne', h₁₀.ne', h₁₁.ne']
      rw [← sub_pos]
      field_simp [h₈.ne', h₉.ne', h₁₀.ne', h₁₁.ne']
      ring_nf
      nlinarith [mul_pos h₃ h₄, mul_pos h₃ h₅, mul_pos h₃ h₆, mul_pos h₄ h₅, mul_pos h₄ h₆, mul_pos h₅ h₆]
    linarith
  
  have h₃ : s < 2 := by
    have h₄ : 0 < a := by linarith
    have h₅ : 0 < b := by linarith
    have h₆ : 0 < c := by linarith
    have h₇ : 0 < d := by linarith
    have h₈ : 0 < a + b + c + d := by linarith
    have h₉ : 0 < a + b + d := by linarith
    have h₁₀ : 0 < a + b + c := by linarith
    have h₁₁ : 0 < b + c + d := by linarith
    have h₁₂ : 0 < a + c + d := by linarith
    have h₁₃ : a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) < 2 := by
      -- Use the fact that each term is less than 1 and the sum of the terms is less than 2
      have h₁₄ : a / (a + b + d) < 1 := by
        rw [div_lt_one (by positivity)]
        nlinarith
      have h₁₅ : b / (a + b + c) < 1 := by
        rw [div_lt_one (by positivity)]
        nlinarith
      have h₁₆ : c / (b + c + d) < 1 := by
        rw [div_lt_one (by positivity)]
        nlinarith
      have h₁₇ : d / (a + c + d) < 1 := by
        rw [div_lt_one (by positivity)]
        nlinarith
      -- Sum the inequalities and use the fact that the sum of the denominators is greater than the sum of the numerators
      have h₁₈ : a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) < 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 := by
        linarith
      -- Improve the bound by considering that some denominators overlap
      have h₁₉ : a / (a + b + d) + b / (a + b + c) + c / (b + c + d) + d / (a + c + d) < 2 := by
        have h₂₀ : 0 < a * b := by positivity
        have h₂₁ : 0 < a * c := by positivity
        have h₂₂ : 0 < a * d := by positivity
        have h₂₃ : 0 < b * c := by positivity
        have h₂₄ : 0 < b * d := by positivity
        have h₂₅ : 0 < c * d := by positivity
        field_simp [h₉.ne', h₁₀.ne', h₁₁.ne', h₁₂.ne']
        rw [← sub_pos]
        field_simp [h₉.ne', h₁₀.ne', h₁₁.ne', h₁₂.ne']
        ring_nf
        nlinarith [mul_pos h₄ h₅, mul_pos h₄ h₆, mul_pos h₄ h₇, mul_pos h₅ h₆, mul_pos h₅ h₇, mul_pos h₆ h₇]
      exact h₁₉
    linarith
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩
